title: Wrack EV3 Health
description: EV3 robot health dashboard (PEN-231). v1: battery percentage only, sourced from the device_status heartbeat payload PEN-234 pushes through the unified ingress health leg. NOTE: the panel's PromQL query (wrack_device_status_percentage) is a best-derived guess for the Prometheus/Mimir metric name Grafana Cloud's OTLP gateway produces from wrack.device_status.percentage -- confirm it empirically in Metrics Explorer once live data flows and update this file if it differs (see docs/monitoring/ev3-health-dashboard.md).

panels.title: EV3 Battery %
panels.description: Estimated remaining battery charge, from the device_status heartbeat's percentage field (PEN-234). Metric name pending empirical confirmation in Grafana Cloud -- see dashboard description.
